hero.title: 鱼梦江湖
hero.summary: I design interfaces as deliberate digital architecture: logic first, whitespace load-bearing, and every line of code or pixel aligned to structure, rhythm, and stability.

arch.desc: Framework engineering / styling systems / type safety

philosophy.title: Space, Logic, and Digital Order.
philosophy.paragraph1: In the context of a digital architect, the screen is not merely a flat canvas but a physical environment that can be organized and reasoned about. Whitespace is not absence; it is a load-bearing material that defines rhythm and hierarchy.
philosophy.paragraph2: I prefer systems over stacking, and aim to express the clearest information hierarchy with the fewest possible DOM structures. Any sense of beauty should rest on clarity, restraint, and uncompromising geometric alignment.
